sourcesContent:
export const products = [
  { id: 1, name: "Wireless Earbuds Pro", category: "electronics", price: 49.99, rating: 4.5, reviews: 128, emoji: "🎧", badge: "", description: "Premium sound with ANC" },
  { id: 2, name: "Smart Watch Series X", category: "electronics", price: 129.99, rating: 5, reviews: 342, emoji: "⌚", badge: "Hot", description: "Health & fitness tracking" },
  { id: 3, name: "Laptop Stand Adjustable", category: "electronics", price: 34.99, rating: 4, reviews: 89, emoji: "💻", badge: "", description: "Ergonomic aluminum build" },
  { id: 4, name: "Bluetooth Speaker", category: "electronics", price: 79.99, rating: 4.5, reviews: 201, emoji: "🔊", badge: "New", description: "360° immersive audio" },
  { id: 5, name: "USB-C Hub 7-in-1", category: "electronics", price: 44.99, rating: 4, reviews: 67, emoji: "🔌", badge: "", description: "Multi-port connectivity" },
  { id: 6, name: "Linen Button Shirt", category: "fashion", price: 39.99, rating: 4.5, reviews: 156, emoji: "👕", badge: "New", description: "Breathable summer fabric" },
  { id: 7, name: "Canvas Sneakers", category: "fashion", price: 59.99, rating: 5, reviews: 289, emoji: "👟", badge: "", description: "Classic minimalist style" },
  { id: 8, name: "Silk Scarf Premium", category: "fashion", price: 24.99, rating: 3.5, reviews: 45, emoji: "🧣", badge: "", description: "100% pure mulberry silk" },
  { id: 9, name: "Leather Tote Bag", category: "fashion", price: 89.99, rating: 4.5, reviews: 178, emoji: "👜", badge: "Hot", description: "Genuine full-grain leather" },
  { id: 10, name: "Wool Beanie", category: "fashion", price: 19.99, rating: 4, reviews: 93, emoji: "🧢", badge: "", description: "Merino wool blend" },
  { id: 11, name: "Artisan Coffee Blend", category: "food", price: 14.99, rating: 5, reviews: 412, emoji: "☕", badge: "", description: "Single origin Ethiopian" },
  { id: 12, name: "Dark Chocolate Box", category: "food", price: 12.99, rating: 4.5, reviews: 234, emoji: "🍫", badge: "Hot", description: "70% cacao, 12 pieces" },
  { id: 13, name: "Japanese Green Tea", category: "food", price: 22.99, rating: 5, reviews: 167, emoji: "🍵", badge: "", description: "Premium ceremonial matcha" },
  { id: 14, name: "Wildflower Honey", category: "food", price: 16.99, rating: 4.5, reviews: 98, emoji: "🍯", badge: "New", description: "Raw & unfiltered 500g" },
  { id: 15, name: "Scented Soy Candle", category: "home", price: 18.99, rating: 4, reviews: 143, emoji: "🕯️", badge: "", description: "Vanilla & cedarwood" },
  { id: 16, name: "Ceramic Pour-Over Set", category: "home", price: 42.99, rating: 5, reviews: 89, emoji: "🫖", badge: "New", description: "Handcrafted stoneware" },
  { id: 17, name: "Monstera Plant Pot", category: "home", price: 28.99, rating: 4.5, reviews: 67, emoji: "🌿", badge: "", description: "Terracotta with drainage" },
  { id: 18, name: "Linen Throw Pillow", category: "home", price: 32.99, rating: 4, reviews: 54, emoji: "🛋️", badge: "", description: "Organic stonewashed linen" },
];

export const categories = [
  { id: "all", label: "All Products", icon: "✦" },
  { id: "electronics", label: "Electronics", icon: "⚡" },
  { id: "fashion", label: "Fashion", icon: "✿" },
  { id: "food", label: "Food & Drink", icon: "◎" },
  { id: "home", label: "Home & Living", icon: "⬡" },
